Resources

Curated Cannabis Directory

A hand-picked collection of the best resources, tools, and communities for UK medical cannabis patients. We've done the filtering so you don't have to.

Patient Organisations

PLEA (Patient-Led Engagement for Access)

pleacommunity.org.uk

Community-led patient advocacy organisation working to improve medical cannabis access in the UK. Runs campaigns, publishes patient surveys, and engages with policymakers.

Visit site

Cancard

cancard.co.uk

A patient verification card recognised by UK police forces. Provides identification for medical cannabis patients and supports advocacy for broader access. Free for eligible patients.

Visit site

The CMC (Cannabis Industry Council)

cannabisindustrycouncil.co.uk

The UK's cannabis industry body representing the full supply chain. Publishes industry reports, engages with regulators, and works to improve patient access to medical cannabis.

Visit site

Research & Data

Drug Science

drugscience.org.uk

The UK's leading independent scientific body on drugs. Founded by Professor David Nutt. Publishes research, runs the Project Twenty21 patient registry, and advocates for evidence-based drug policy.

Visit site

MedBud.wiki

medbud.wiki

The UK's most comprehensive medical cannabis resource. Search strains, compare clinics and pharmacies, access detailed patient guides, and join community forums. Independently run.

Visit site

Industry & Policy

Smokie McGreen

smokiemcgreen.com

Patient-focused education platform with terpene infographics, patient rights guides, clinic spotlights, and YouTube content. Plain English, no jargon.

Visit site

UK Medical Cannabis Clinics Directory

medbud.wiki/clinics

MedBud's impartial directory of every UK medical cannabis clinic — pricing, services, pharmacy partnerships, and patient reviews. The definitive starting point for choosing a clinic.

Visit site

Legal

Release — Drug Law Charity

release.org.uk

The UK's leading centre of expertise on drugs and drug law. Provides free legal advice, campaigns for drug policy reform, and publishes research on drug law enforcement.

Visit site

Transform Drug Policy

transformdrugs.org

A think tank campaigning for the legal regulation of drugs. Publishes detailed policy briefs, international comparisons, and economic analyses of drug policy reform.

Visit site
The Ganja Club

Independent UK medical cannabis publication. Science-led, patient-first.

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
